_comment: Check IDs the 'bad' Terraform fixture (infra/bad/) is designed to trigger when scanned via LocalStack. Both localstack-test.yml and tests/integration/ consume this file so the list has a single source of truth.
_exclusions_reason: LocalStack does not faithfully round-trip every AWS API. The exclusions documented below are known LocalStack gaps, not scanner bugs: IAM-001/ECR-003 (managed policy ARNs / registry policies), S3-001/S3-002 (get_public_access_block and get_bucket_encryption return passing defaults), CD-001/CD-002/CD-003 (batch_get_deployment_groups omits autoRollback and alarm fields).
